Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Vladie Viltman, 415.593.7333 for Plaintiff Jeanette Carter-Dawkins.
No other appearances.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF JEANETTE CARTER-DAWKINS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment is Taken Under Submission. Plaintiff's counsel to submitt an amended declaration from Plaintiff Carter-Dawkins with the corrected payment amounts and a proposed order with the amended dollor amounts. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-25-2019 Continued To Oct-02-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Vladie Viltman, 415.593.7333 for Plaintiff Jeanette Carter-Dawkins.
No other appearances.

Discussed. Mr. Viltman states the courtesy copies were delivered and requests a continuance to next week.

The Court rules as follows: PLAINTIFF JEANETTE CARTER-DAWKINS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Final Judgment is continued to October 2, 2019. Plainitff's counsel to give notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
